isi.lyrics:
Lyric JISU PARK - BE HAPPY

Romanization

Feels so good, just breathing tonight
Oh-oh, Wonderland
tell me that you feel it too, babe

Far away, but you’re deep in my heart
Oh-oh, in your eyes
the world’s so bright

Cause I’m yours, take my love, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah

Cause I’m yours, take my heart, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah py yeah

With every step, we rise again
Oh-oh, through the dark
we’ll fly away, lovin’ you babe

Now we're shining, reaching the stars
Oh-oh, in your arms, we’ll never stop
I want you to stay with me

Cause I’m yours, take my love, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah

Cause I’m yours, take my heart, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah py yeah

It’s a party through the night
We’re dancing like disco, co-co
Grooving, take control
Moving with my soul, oh-oh-oh

Cause I’m yours, take my love, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah

Cause I’m yours, take my heart, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah py yeah

Hangeul

Feels so good, just breathing tonight
Oh-oh, Wonderland
tell me that you feel it too, babe

Far away, but you’re deep in my heart
Oh-oh, in your eyes
the world’s so bright

Cause I’m yours, take my love, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah

Cause I’m yours, take my heart, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah py yeah

With every step, we rise again
Oh-oh, through the dark
we’ll fly away, lovin’ you babe

Now we're shining, reaching the stars
Oh-oh, in your arms, we’ll never stop
I want you to stay with me

Cause I’m yours, take my love, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah

Cause I’m yours, take my heart, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah py yeah

It’s a party through the night
We’re dancing like disco, co-co
Grooving, take control
Moving with my soul, oh-oh-oh

Cause I’m yours, take my love, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah

Cause I’m yours, take my heart, it’s all about love
Now let’s just be happy
happy, happy, happy, py py yeah py yeah py yeah

isi.lyrics:
Lyric You're Mine - Whatever

Romanization

Hey! You stop worrying!
The awaited TV shows and lots of chances
It's a lie if there's no burden, whatever?

Just one moment is enough
For the heart-beat
I'm ready to go anywhere. let's we go higher

Just one moment, a breath, a beat
Blue waves dance tonight
No fears, just us in endless streams tonight

Just one moment is enough
For the heart-beat
I'm ready to go anywhere. let's we go higher

Just one moment, a breath, a beat
Blue waves dance tonight
No fears, just us in endless streams tonight

Hangeul

Hey! You stop worrying!
The awaited TV shows and lots of chances
It's a lie if there's no burden, whatever?

Just one moment is enough
For the heart-beat
I'm ready to go anywhere. let's we go higher

Just one moment, a breath, a beat
Blue waves dance tonight
No fears, just us in endless streams tonight

Just one moment is enough
For the heart-beat
I'm ready to go anywhere. let's we go higher

Just one moment, a breath, a beat
Blue waves dance tonight
No fears, just us in endless streams tonight

Just one moment is enough

Just one moment, a breath, a beat

isi.lyrics:
Lyric You're Mine - i loved smith

Romanization

Smith, when I was in love
I've come too far now

True love lasts a lifetime
Wherever it is, with you
I can get through everything
I hope you'll be happy again
It's my time to leave

I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me

Call me when you can try
i think about you all the time

True love lasts a lifetime
Wherever it is, with you
I can get through everything
I hope you'll be happy again
It's my time to leave

I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me
I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me

Hangeul

Smith, when I was in love
I've come too far now

True love lasts a lifetime
Wherever it is, with you
I can get through everything
I hope you'll be happy again
It's my time to leave

I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me

Call me when you can try
i think about you all the time

True love lasts a lifetime
Wherever it is, with you
I can get through everything
I hope you'll be happy again
It's my time to leave

I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me
I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me

Smith, when I was in love 
I've come too far now

True love lasts a lifetime 
Wherever it is, with you
I can get through everything
I hope you'll be happy again  
It's my time to leave 

I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me

Call me when you can try 
i think about you all the time

True love lasts a lifetime 
Wherever it is, with you
I can get through everything
I hope you'll be happy again  
It's my time to leave 

I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me
I'm going into hiding now when you miss look for me
I want you to know you could be the one for me

isi.lyrics:
Lyric HYUNJI - With You

Romanization

sonjapgo georeoganeun i gil
uriui baljaguk arae
neowa na sigani meomchun deut
uri dulmanui mudae

eotteon sunggando itji anko
byeolcheoreom banjjagin uriui kkumeul
seoroui pum ane dama ganjikhaja

When I’m with you, everything feels right
neowa hamkkemyeon eodideun joa
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
uriui sarangeun
eonjena bitnal geoya

geu eotteon siryeon chajawado
uri hamkkeramyeon duryeopji ana
seoroui pum ane anggyeo georeogaja

When I’m with you, everything feels right
neowa hamkkemyeon eodideun joa
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
uriui sarangeun
eonjena bitnal geoya

ijebuteo pyeolchyeojil
areumdaun uri iyagi
seollem gadeuk moyeodeuneun sarang
hangsang gyeote isseulge

When I’m with you, everything feels right
nawa hamkkehaejwoseo gomawo
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
uriui sarangeun
yeongwonhi bitnal geoya

When I’m with you, everything feels right
neowa hamkkemyeon eodideun joa
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
uriui sarangeun
eonjena bitnal geoya


Hangeul

손잡고 걸어가는 이 길
우리의 발자국 아래
너와 나 시간이 멈춘 듯
우리 둘만의 무대

어떤 순간도 잊지 않고
별처럼 반짝인 우리의 꿈을
서로의 품 안에 담아 간직하자

When I’m with you, everything feels right
너와 함께면 어디든 좋아
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
우리의 사랑은
언제나 빛날 거야

그 어떤 시련 찾아와도
우리 함께라면 두렵지 않아
서로의 품 안에 안겨 걸어가자

When I’m with you, everything feels right
너와 함께면 어디든 좋아
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
우리의 사랑은
언제나 빛날 거야

이제부터 펼쳐질
아름다운 우리 이야기
설렘 가득 모여드는 사랑
항상 곁에 있을게

When I’m with you, everything feels right
나와 함께해줘서 고마워
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
우리의 사랑은
영원히 빛날 거야

When I’m with you, everything feels right
너와 함께면 어디든 좋아
I’ll be there for you, forever and a day
우리의 사랑은
언제나 빛날 거야

isi.lyrics:
Lyric pedlar - Always

Romanization

always in the heart of the street
looking to just sit and rest
but if you meant to come to me and lend me a hand
is it hard not to hesitate
there's only so much I ask for

heart cold as ice, when you turn and leave
always on the edge is my sanity
indecision keeps me wide awake
I don’t want it

lift me, only higher
til I feel that breeze warm
like I wanted

always in the heart of the street
looking to just sit and rest
but if you meant to come to me and lend me a hand
Is it hard not to hesitate
there's only so much I ask for

maybe on that side of the road
I could spend more time fantasizing about something

night grows dark and cold
can we get through the season once more
waiting out the dusk

always in the heart of the street
looking to just sit and rest
but if you meant to come to me and lend me a hand
is it hard not to hesitate
there's only so much I ask for

Hangeul

looking to just sit and rest
but if you meant to come to me and lend me a hand
is it hard not to hesitate
there's only so much I ask for

always on the edge is my sanity
indecision keeps me wide awake
I don’t want it

lift me, only higher
til I feel that breeze warm
like I wanted

always in the heart of the street
looking to just sit and rest
but if you meant to come to me and lend me a hand
Is it hard not to hesitate
there's only so much I ask for

maybe on that side of the road
I could spend more time fantasizing about something

night grows dark and cold
can we get through the season once more
waiting out the dusk

always in the heart of the street
looking to just sit and rest
but if you meant to come to me and lend me a hand
is it hard not to hesitate
there's only so much I ask for

isi.lyrics:
Lyric M1NU - Omoi (Prod. RIMIMI RAIRA)

Romanization

﻿uriga geuryeotdeon miraeui jidoneun
jjijeojin chaekdeulcheoreom barame heutnallyeogago

haneul nopi nara gal geot gatatdeon
uriui haengbokhaetdeon sigammajeo
chatji mot hal geol aljiman

naneun igoseul hemeimyeo
nega doraogil gidarimyeo
haega tteulgeorago mitgoseo
gamanhi neoreul gidarimyeon

eonjengga doraogetji
haneun maeumeuro neoreul pumgosipeo
maldo andoendaneunggeol algoitjiman

もしも君を もう一度
(manyak neoreul dasi han beon)
会えるなら 何を言おうか？
(mannal su itdamyeon museun mareul halkka?)

君はどこへ行くの？
(neoneun eodiro ganeunggeoya?)
たった一度でいい、君に会えるなら
(dan han beonirado joa, neoreul mannal suman itdamyeon)

君が残した 最後の言葉が
(nega namgin majimak mari)
夜の静寂に溶けていく
(bamui goyoham sogeuro nogadeureo)

siganeul neomeodo byeonhaji anneunggeon
neoreul hyanghan nae maeumgwa gieokppuniya

amudo eomneun eodumsogeul barabwasseo
dwidorabomyeon nega isseul geomman gatasseunikka
kkok jwieotdeon jageun onggiga
ajikdo nae sonkkeute nama nal gamssajuneun geot gateunde

taneun maeumeul hearimyeo
nega doraogil gidarimyeo
dasi olgeorago mitgoseo
gamanhi neoreul gidarimyeon

hambeomman dorabwajumyeon
jageun maeumsoge naneun sumgosipeo
maldo andoendaneunggeol algoitjiman

もしも君を もう一度
(manyak neoreul dasi han beon)
会えるなら 何を言おうか？
(mannal su itdamyeon museun mareul halkka?)

君はどこへ行くの？
(neoneun eodiro ganeunggeoya?)
たった一度でいい、君に会えるなら
(dan han beonirado joa, neoreul mannal suman itdamyeon)

君が残した 最後の言葉が
(nega namgin majimak mari)
夜の静寂に溶けていく
(bamui goyoham sogeuro nogadeureo)

siganeul neomeodo byeonhaji anneunggeon
neoreul hyanghan nae maeumgwa gieokppuniya

Hangeul

﻿우리가 그렸던 미래의 지도는
찢어진 책들처럼 바람에 흩날려가고

하늘 높이 날아 갈 것 같았던
우리의 행복했던 시간마저
찾지 못 할 걸 알지만

나는 이곳을 헤메이며
네가 돌아오길 기다리며
해가 뜰거라고 믿고서
가만히 너를 기다리면

언젠가 돌아오겠지
하는 마음으로 너를 품고싶어
말도 안된다는걸 알고있지만

もしも君を もう一度
(만약 너를 다시 한 번)
会えるなら 何を言おうか？
(만날 수 있다면 무슨 말을 할까?)

君はどこへ行くの？
(너는 어디로 가는거야?)
たった一度でいい、君に会えるなら
(단 한 번이라도 좋아, 너를 만날 수만 있다면)

君が残した 最後の言葉が
(네가 남긴 마지막 말이)
夜の静寂に溶けていく
(밤의 고요함 속으로 녹아들어)

시간을 넘어도 변하지 않는건
너를 향한 내 마음과 기억뿐이야

아무도 없는 어둠속을 바라봤어
뒤돌아보면 네가 있을 것만 같았으니까
꼭 쥐었던 작은 온기가
아직도 내 손끝에 남아 날 감싸주는 것 같은데

타는 마음을 헤아리며
네가 돌아오길 기다리며
다시 올거라고 믿고서
가만히 너를 기다리면

한번만 돌아봐주면
작은 마음속에 나는 숨고싶어
말도 안된다는걸 알고있지만

もしも君を もう一度
(만약 너를 다시 한 번)
会えるなら 何を言おうか？
(만날 수 있다면 무슨 말을 할까?)

君はどこへ行くの？
(너는 어디로 가는거야?)
たった一度でいい、君に会えるなら
(단 한 번이라도 좋아, 너를 만날 수만 있다면)

君が残した 最後の言葉が
(네가 남긴 마지막 말이)
夜の静寂に溶けていく
(밤의 고요함 속으로 녹아들어)

시간을 넘어도 변하지 않는건
너를 향한 내 마음과 기억뿐이야

말도 안된다는걸 알고있지만

もしも君を もう一度 
(만약 너를 다시 한 번)
会えるなら 何を言おうか？
(만날 수 있다면 무슨 말을 할까?)

君はどこへ行くの？
(너는 어디로 가는거야?)
たった一度でいい、君に会えるなら 
(단 한 번이라도 좋아, 너를 만날 수만 있다면)

君が残した 最後の言葉が
(네가 남긴 마지막 말이)
夜の静寂に溶けていく
(밤의 고요함 속으로 녹아들어)

시간을 넘어도 변하지 않는건
너를 향한 내 마음과 기억뿐이야

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ara & JUSTHIS - City Life

Romanization

Yeah we’re livin’ in Seoul city
So frustrated

Yeah, we know what the right answer is
But when this phone rings I can’t help myself
I gave this city my heart and soul
Not just my body – I'm talkin' 'bout soul
I’m crying out for it
guhaejwo from this city life, yeah

modu jjan geotcheoreom ‘hwaiting’
jinsim eomneun ne numbicheun like a fish
naman eoreobeoryeonna simjangi tting
naman eorin geongga bwa tto “はい はい algetseumnida”
sakhin hwaga ssain my dream world
eoneusae da ijeo ‘na wae waitji yeogi’
chajaya hae iyu ’til I’m hyped
nan ollagal geol ara haeya hal geotdo ara
geunde oneuldo jinaga
geoul sok bulpyeonhan naui maeum
teok mitkkaji chaoreuneun bam
cheonjang wieseon
kkeutnaji anneun saenggak kkorijapgi
haneurui byeoreun eopgo
ttangen neonsaindeul
kkumkkuneun cheokhaneun dosi
Baby I’m out of my mind
guhaejwo city life

Yeah, we know what the right answer is
But when this phone rings I can’t help myself
I gave this city my heart and soul
Not just my body – I'm talkin' 'bout soul
I’m crying out for it
guhaejwo from this city life

sumeul mot swieo teojigi jikjeonui propane
jebal naepdwo ije an mallyeo nan dongsaeng
dubuneun dwaetgo ootoro salge naol ttaen
mian geunde i jit hagodo mot jjigeo 100eokdae what

Layback in the Maybach geuryeo mirae
Airplane mode ani jjintaeng airplane mode
pyeondoro kkeuneobeorine nan pyo
Yecheoreom dakchyeo maenijeo
Black card han jang ane jip han chae
jeon segyereul hyeonggwammun ape dwo
raendeumakeu boineun penteuhauseu wieseo yoga
Need a detox - my soul
moduga jjocha gold geureoda gaseum ane na hole
Everywhere dopamine, dopamine jjalbeun mase jungdok
seoul city maeil bam ullineun jeonhwagineun suljari
biwobeorin byeongmangkeum bieobeorin maeumgwa
banjjak hypeeuro gajja saranggwa gajja (high)
Exdeura mian nan eonjena hyeonjaega prime time
mitugo mwogo nan bangsihyeok bangtan mun naiteu bakjinyeong
Been there, done that itaewon gangnam hongdae
Seoul city is gonna steal your soul
like it made me
neon geunyang ‘ne’ otacheoreom sp
Look at my red bottoms - they devilish

24, (Never stop)
Like they know us (Where we live)
Messages stack like a city of lights (hey, hey)
City of lights
(let me get it right, let me get it right)
(Hey, hey)
24, (No control)
Night is young, (Pick your poison)
Like they know us - (Where we hide)
We go blind in the city of lights (hey, hey)
City of lights
(let me get it right, let me get it right)
(Hey, hey, hey, let’s go)

Yeah, we know what the right answer is
But when this phone rings I can’t help myself
I gave this city my heart and soul
Not just my body – I'm talkin' 'bout soul
I’m crying out for it
guhaejwo from this city life

Hangeul

Yeah we’re livin’ in Seoul city
So frustrated

Yeah, we know what the right answer is
But when this phone rings I can’t help myself
I gave this city my heart and soul
Not just my body – I'm talkin' 'bout soul
I’m crying out for it
구해줘 from this city life, yeah

모두 짠 것처럼 ‘화이팅’
진심 없는 네 눈빛은 like a fish
나만 얼어버렸나 심장이 띵
나만 어린 건가 봐 또 “はい はい 알겠습니다”
삭힌 화가 쌓인 my dream world
어느새 다 잊어 ‘나 왜 와있지 여기’
찾아야 해 이유 ’til I’m hyped
난 올라갈 걸 알아 해야 할 것도 알아
근데 오늘도 지나가
거울 속 불편한 나의 마음
턱 밑까지 차오르는 밤
천장 위에선
끝나지 않는 생각 꼬리잡기
하늘의 별은 없고
땅엔 네온사인들
꿈꾸는 척하는 도시
Baby I’m out of my mind
구해줘 city life

Yeah, we know what the right answer is
But when this phone rings I can’t help myself
I gave this city my heart and soul
Not just my body – I'm talkin' 'bout soul
I’m crying out for it
구해줘 from this city life

숨을 못 쉬어 터지기 직전의 propane
제발 냅둬 이제 안 말려 난 동생
두부는 됐고 오오토로 살게 나올 땐
미안 근데 이 짓 하고도 못 찍어 100억대 what

Layback in the Maybach 그려 미래
Airplane mode 아니 찐탱 airplane mode
편도로 끊어버리네 난 표
Ye처럼 닥쳐 매니저
Black card 한 장 안에 집 한 채
전 세계를 현관문 앞에 둬
랜드마크 보이는 펜트하우스 위에서 yoga
Need a detox - my soul
모두가 쫓아 gold 그러다 가슴 안에 나 hole
Everywhere dopamine, dopamine 짧은 맛에 중독
서울 city 매일 밤 울리는 전화기는 술자리
비워버린 병만큼 비어버린 마음과
반짝 hype으로 가짜 사랑과 가짜 (high)
Ex들아 미안 난 언제나 현재가 prime time
미투고 뭐고 난 방시혁 방탄 문 나이트 박진영
Been there, done that 이태원 강남 홍대
Seoul city is gonna steal your soul
like it made me
넌 그냥 ‘네’ 오타처럼 sp
Look at my red bottoms - they devilish

24, (Never stop)
Like they know us (Where we live)
Messages stack like a city of lights (hey, hey)
City of lights
(let me get it right, let me get it right)
(Hey, hey)
24, (No control)
Night is young, (Pick your poison)
Like they know us - (Where we hide)
We go blind in the city of lights (hey, hey)
City of lights
(let me get it right, let me get it right)
(Hey, hey, hey, let’s go)

Yeah, we know what the right answer is
But when this phone rings I can’t help myself
I gave this city my heart and soul
Not just my body – I'm talkin' 'bout soul
I’m crying out for it
구해줘 from this city life
